ratings.comment:
Material is pretty fundamental for me to pass quals. He gave rewrite opportunity in midterm exam, so no worries about grade. 
The first several weeks were fast in pace, but it was quickly adjusted after around third of the semester.

- Class material is well organized, I clearly know what to expect in each module. 
- He has really good clarity in explaining the materials in the class. 
- Proper work load.
- Sebastian is always super positive to help or discuss about concepts and materials.
